Build Your Dynamic or Ecommerce Website & App Instantly without Coding & Designing using VistaShopee Platform.
Suitable for Every Industry of Every Size & at Every Stage of Business.
We redefine the eCommerce as Everyone’s Commerce
Features
Comprehensive Product Showcase
Empower your business with VistaShopee ecommerce platform offering unlimited products, each showcased with compelling photos and detailed descriptions.

Seamlessly import products from csv or an extensive ready-to-use library, organize them into unlimited categories, sub-categories, and brands for easy navigation. Enhance product visibility with unlimited photos, videos, and description tabs, all optimized for SEO.
Provide a rich customer experience with customizable product options, specifications, tags, addons, and the convenience of a custom inquiry form. Encourage feedback and build trust with product reviews while offering additional resources such as videos and documents
Read More
Super Flexible Product Pricing
Experience seamless product pricing management at Vistashopee with captivating MRP and sell prices, enticing you to make that irresistible purchase.
Effortlessly navigate through tax processes while staying in the loop with daily price updates for ever-changing market dynamics. Customize your pricing options for products with multiple choices and cater to B2B businesses with user-specific pricing, creating personalized encounters through versatile price slabs.
Maintain control over information flow by concealing prices, sparking inquiries that lead to a more engaging and tailored negotiation process
Read More
Integrated Shopping Cart
VistaShopee's Ecommerce Cart offers seamless integration and effortless checkout.
Manage billing and multiple shipping addresses with ease.
Set minimum cart values and personalize orders with packaging and date/time slot selection. Customers can leave notes, and with abandon cart reporting and repeat order options, shopping is made convenient and tailored to individual preferences
Read More
Multiple Payment System
VistaShopee offers various options for Payment Gateway, including Cash On Delivery, QR Code (UPI), and integration with leading Indian payment gateways like Razorpay, Phone Pe, Instamojo, CashFree, CC Avenue, and PayU.
Extend your reach globally with integrated international gateways such as Paypal and Stripe. Stay informed with Abandoned Cart Reporting, ensuring a comprehensive view of customer interactions for optimized sales strategies
Read More
Managed Inventory
VistaShopee's Inventory Management empowers you to track stock levels for each product and its individual options. Receive stock warnings, set values for minimum stock, and choose to display stock to customers or notify the admin. Define actions on minimum stock, from making a product inactive to accepting orders or allowing customers to choose 'Notify Me,' ensuring optimal control over your inventory
Read More
Adaptable Shipping
VistaShopee's Shipping module offers comprehensive control with customizable shipping zones and multiple methods tailored to each zone.
Enjoy flexibility with conditional free shipping and set custom rates per zone for precise cost management. Optimize shipping calculations with a volumetric weight chart and streamline operations with API-based shipping integration, including Ship Rocket and We Fast - Borzo. Enhance efficiency further with a self-delivery system and a dedicated delivery person app for seamless order fulfilment.
Read More
Third Party Integrations
VistaShopee adopts a 'No Plugin Required' approach for seamless third-party integrations. Effortlessly connect with Petpooja for enhanced functionality in restaurant management. Facilitate smooth transactions with payment gateway integrations and streamline order fulfilment through shipping integrations, ensuring a cohesive and efficient e-commerce experience.
Read More
Robust Content Management
VistaShopee's CMS empowers your brand with dynamic content showcasing.
Craft a compelling narrative using banners, highlight your services and unique selling points (USPs). Boost credibility with testimonials, address common queries with FAQs, and showcase your work through an interactive gallery. Keep your audience engaged with insightful blogs, upcoming events, and detailed team profiles, creating a comprehensive online presence for your business.
Read More
Ready to use Marketing Tools
Elevate your marketing strategy on VistaShopee with enticing offer banners and seamless integration of promo codes. Boost sales with effective cross-selling and upselling features, maximizing customer engagement. Foster direct communication through WhatsApp Chat and Tawk To, ensuring personalized assistance.
Keep your audience informed with dynamic updates using the Ticker Tape feature for a captivating browsing experience.
Read More
FREE Marketing App (VistaShopee SMART)
Experience limitless possibilities with Free APP VistaShopee SMART, offering unlimited user access. Elevate your brand with an online business card, engaging social post creator, and personalized branded greetings. Seamlessly manage your catalog, point of sale (POS), and bulk WhatsApp communication. Securely store information with the vault and streamline expense tracking for efficient business management
Read More
Take Control of Digital Marketing
Empower your digital presence with VistaShopee's comprehensive toolkit.
Enhance search engine visibility with on-page SEO optimization, including alt text for images, meta descriptions, and keywords.
Seamlessly integrate Google Tag Manager and verify meta tags for enhanced analytics and search engine indexing. Keep your website structured and error-free with sitemap generation, robots.txt management, and broken link detection. Engage your audience further with dynamic Instagram feed integration
Read More
Sell almost every type of Products
VistaShopee caters to many product types, ensuring smooth shopping experience. From standard goods to electronics, our platform seamlessly handles configurable items and digital products. Explore personalized options with photo and design prints, while also offering a stunning collection of jewelry. With VistaShopee, selling every product type is made simple and efficient
Read More
Attractive Themes
Elevate your online storefront with VistaShopee's captivating web themes. Choose from a range of attractive designs, each crafted to enhance user experience. Whether you're in fashion, electronics, or beyond, our themes cater to diverse industries. Make a lasting impression and stand out in the digital landscape with VistaShopee's visually appealing and customizable web themes
Read More
All in One Infrastructure (SaaS)
Experience a robust SaaS infrastructure with VistaShopee, offering free cloud hosting for seamless performance. Enjoy unlimited storage space and bandwidth to scale your business effortlessly. Connect your domain seamlessly and prioritize security with complimentary SSL certification, ensuring a reliable and secure online presence for your e-commerce platform.
Read More

Why VistaShopee
Simple
No Coding required, No Technical Knowledge required. Fully CMS driven Websites & App; makes it very easy for any Business to adopt.
Updated
Feature Updates & Improvements of App and eCommerce Platform are released very frequently & will be available to all users
Fast
Data Structuring & handling makes VistaShopee Fast in every respect. Faster in deployment, learning, implementation, edit, customer experience.
Integrated
With Whats App & Tawk to for Chat. PayTM, Razorpay, CashFree for Payment. Ship Rocket & Borzo for Delivery. PetPooja for Restaurants. Tally for Accounting.
Affordable
VistaShopee App starts with Free; “No Plugin Required” strategy of VistaShopee makes every plan most affordable without any Hidden Cost.
Supported
VistaShopee every feature is supported with Training Videos in Hindi & English, Dedicated Support Team is available through Phone & Online Chat.
Industries We Cover
Electronics, Mobile, Photo, Software, Grocery, Package Food, Bakery, Garment, Fashion Accessories, Restaurant, Gift, Finance, Furniture, Interior, Jewellery, Cosmetics, Prints, Flower / Plants, Real Estate, Pharma

FAQs

VistaShopee is Platform to build your Dynamic or Ecommerce Website & App. You just need to add your Company Info, Product Details, Set your Payment & Shipping on our very easy to use Admin Panel. You can be Live within Minutes

Absolutely; You may start 7 Days FREE Trial now. The Best thing is you neither have to make any commitment nor you have to give your credit card details to avail this No Obligation 7 Days FREE Trial

You may start using VistaShopee Trial FREE for 7 days. After FREE Trial you may choose your Price Plan. It starts @Rs.4999 to start full functional eCommerce Website & App with unlimited Products. Free Cloud Hosting & Maintenance. Accept payment with ready to use configurable payment gateway & Ship products with integrated Shipping or configure your choice of shipping.

Not at all, You don’t need any Pre Qualifications or Training to use VistaShopee. Its very easy to use. But to Support you better; we have our Training Videos & Dedicated Support reachable on +91-9808 198 198or support@vistashopee.com

Certainly. You get Free Personal Sub Domain to start your Shop. You may bind your own Domain to this Sub Domain easily & It’s FREE. If you do not have your Domain Book it Now. Our Support Team will help you to bind your Domain to your Sub Domain; reachable on +91-9808 198 198 or support@vistashopee.com

Yes Sure. There are multiple ways offered by VistaShopee to accept Payments without paying any additional Transaction Fee to VistaShopee. If you already accept payment Via UPI, just upload your QR code for your Customers to pay you. If you already have Payment Gateway signed up. Just enter your credentials in VistaShopee Admin Panel & Payment Gateway is ready to accept payment on your website. If you do not have Payment Gateway; Our Dedicated Support Team may help you to signup for one. They are reachable on +91-9808 198 198 or support@vistashopee.com

VistaShopee has multiple Themes to choose from. Our Support Team can help you to choose right theme to match your Vision & Objective. You may do lot of Personalization within theme as well see How. If you have any Specific requirement about Theme; we may develop New Theme for you on chargable basis.


We definetly understand your Problem & have our implementation Partners Nationwide. Choose Nearest Partner; who can help you in any of required services on chrgable basis. Services offered by our Partners are Product Photography, Content Writing, Website Implimantation, SEO, Social Media Posting, Complete Digital Marketing, etc.
